Banner.Description: I have 2+ years of experiencein Full stack development in building scalable, responsive web applications using Angular and JavaScript. Skilled in UI/UX implementation and REST API integration. Proven ability to collaborate with cross functional teams to deliver robust, high performance solutions.
AboutMe.Title: About Me
AboutMe.Paragraphs: Frontend Developer & Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience. Specialized in developing and maintaining Single Page Applications (SPAs) for the Health Insurance domain, handling high-impact products including ABHA (Ayushman Bharat Health Account), Topup, IVF, and HealthPA.

Recognized expert in OTP Integration - led cross-domain integration of OTP services enabling seamless authentication across multiple health insurance products, improving user onboarding by 30%+. Built responsive, performant interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript/ES6+, and React.js with focus on cross-browser compatibility and mobile-first design.

Collaborated with backend teams to integrate APIs for real-time health data processing and optimized application performance for 1M+ concurrent users. Passionate about writing clean, maintainable code and implementing modern development practices.
Some of the technologies I have trained and worked with include (but are not limited to):
Experience.Title: Experience
FeatureProjects.Title: My Projects
FeatureProjects.Label: Highlighted Project

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Disease Prediction System
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Built AI/ML-based web application for disease prediction achieving 93% accuracy with integrated doctor search functionality and dynamic visualization. Developed using JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Angular, with version control via GitHub.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Book Store App
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Developed comprehensive online bookstore with full e-commerce functionality including shopping cart, wishlist, order placement, product reviews, and dynamic rating filters. Built with Angular, JavaScript, HTML/SCSS, PostgreSQL, and Material-UI for a responsive, user-friendly interface.

Contact.Title: Say Hi!
Contact.Content: I will be glad to hear from you if you want to discuss new opportunities. Write to me, and I will respond as soon as I see your message.
